title: North American Clean Fuels Market: Month-in-Review December 2024
content:
Key Highlights:

Canada CFR:
  • The average offer price in CC3 decreased from CAD 118.89 to CAD 93.10, marking a 0.22% decline.
  • The average bid prices for CC2 fell by 3.48% decrease, while the average offer prices in CC2 dropped by around a 1.80% decline.
California LCFS:
  • CA LCFS average Type 1 monthly credit price fell by 1.81% month-over-month (MoM) in December.
  • Monthly credit transactions declined by 77.92% MoM in December.
British Columbia LCFS:
  • Average credit price under BC LCFS continued to fall by 17.26% MoM, reaching $185.55.
  • BC LCFS monthly trading rebounded, recording a 8.72x MoM rise.
Oregon CFP:
  • In November, OR CFP average credit prices increased by 54.73% compared to October.
  • OR CFP trading activity in November fell as 160.95k credits were transferred.
Washington CFS:
  • Average credit prices in WA CFS declined by 35.42% MoM.
  • For November, a total of 76,273 credits were traded across 16 transfers.
Â United States RFS:
  • In November, D3 RIN prices decreased while D4, D5 and D6 prices increased.
  • RIN Generation decreased by 6.26% and transaction volumes of RINs continued to fell by 23.51% MoM.
author: Mansift Kaur
